allow: Bash(cmd /c "del /f C:\\klario\\.next\\dev\\lock" 2>&1 && sleep 1 && npm run dev)
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ProcessId=28404 get Name,CommandLine,ProcessId 2>nul")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 28404 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process -Id 28404 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 28404 -Force" && sleep 2 && rm -f /c/klario/.next/dev/lock && npm run dev -- -p 3000 2>&1)
Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /IM msiexec.exe /F 2>nul & taskkill /IM winget.exe /F 2>nul & echo done")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\klario\\screenshots' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length" 2>&1
powershell -Command "Test-Path 'C:\\klario\\screenshots'" 2>&1)
